requirement_topic.en: Electrical safety, S-mark, and in-market conformity model
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全、S标志与市场对照模型
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全、S 標誌與市場對照模型

summary.en: Argentina import pathways use Secretaría de Comercio-linked destination handling, while S-mark and IRAM-certified conformity routes are the common practical baseline for in-scope power tools. Nationally adopted IRAM safety standards are typically aligned to IEC family texts such as IEC 62841, and tooling should present an Argentine-facing electrical safety case with model-level evidence and importer responsibility for release.
summary.zh: 阿根廷以目的地通道管理电动工具合规，S标志与IRAM认证路径是受控范围内常见的实际准入基线。IRAM标准体系多采用与IEC一致的文本（如IEC 62841），并要求按机型建立面向阿根廷的电气安全文件与进口商放行责任链。
summary.zht: 阿根廷以目的地通道管理電動工具合規，S 標誌與 IRAM 認證路徑是受控範圍內常見的實際准入基線。IRAM 標準體系多採用與 IEC 一致的文本（如 IEC 62841），並要求按機型建立面向阿根廷的電氣安全文件與進口商放行責任鏈。

standards_or_laws: Secretaría de Comercio market-entry workflows for imported regulated electrical products
IRAM certification pathways and S-mark expectations for applicable power tools
IRAM adopted IEC 62841 and IEC 60745 safety references
CUIT-holding importer ownership for customs clearance and release

summary.en: China export files are commonly based on GB / GBT domestic safety tests and CCC where required, which can inform design review but are not a direct substitute for Argentina destination-file completion.
summary.zh: 中国出口材料通常基于GB/GBT国内电气安全测试与适用范围内CCC，这些材料可用于技术评审，但不能直接替代阿根廷目的地放行文件。
summary.zht: 中國出口材料通常基於 GB/GBT 國內電氣安全測試與適用範圍內 CCC，這些資料可用於技術審核，但不能直接替代阿根廷目的地放行文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 3883 series electrical-safety regime for hand tools and similar classes

gap.en: Grid basics are close (220V, 50Hz is common), while China often uses 380V three-phase in industrial contexts. The major gap is the absence of Argentine destination S-mark alignment and importer ownership mapping when only GB/CCC outputs are prepared.
gap.zh: 供电参数上可部分对齐（220V、50Hz接近），而中国部分场景仍采用380V三相供电。主要差距在于仅有GB/CCC材料时未完成阿根廷S标志对照和进口商归属映射。
gap.zht: 供電參數上可部分對齊（220V、50Hz 接近），而中國部分情境仍使用 380V 三相供電。主要差距在於僅有 GB/CCC 材料時未完成阿根廷 S 標誌對照與進口商歸屬映射。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope imported power tools where destination pathways require destination electrical safety confirmation; IRAM/S-mark-aligned evidence is required for market release readiness.
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB / GB/T safety and CCC coverage is mandatory where applicable in China, but it is not destination-complete for Argentina release.
mandatory_status.zht: 中國 GB / GB/T 安全與 CCC 在中國適用範圍內為強制，卻不足以作為阿根廷放行的完整依據。

source.publisher: Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación (IRAM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Argentina-ready when only Chinese GB/CCC files exist without a destination S-mark/IRAM electrical conformity and importer-linked release package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若仅有中国GB/CCC文件且未建立S标志/IRAM电气符合性和进口商放行包，不能视为阿根廷就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若僅有中國 GB/CCC 文件且未建立 S 標誌/IRAM 電氣符合性與進口商放行包，不能視為阿根廷就緒。
